Test Summary: Verify authenticated user can view account balance on dashboard

Action: Verify account balance is displayed on dashboard
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and account balance is visible on the dashboard showing the correct amount

Test Summary: Verify unauthenticated user is redirected to login page
Action: Clear all browser cookies and session data
Attempt to directly navigate to dashboard URL

Expected Result: User is automatically redirected to the login page and cannot view the dashboard or account balance

Test Summary: Verify balance displays in USD format with 2 decimal places

Expected Result: Balance is displayed with $ symbol prefix and exactly 2 decimal places (e.g., $1,500.50)

Action: Login with credentials for zero balance account

Expected Result: Zero balance is displayed as $0.00 and not as blank, null, empty, or $0

Data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Initial Balance: $1,000.00|Updated Balance: $1,050.00|Refresh Interval: 30 seconds

Action: Monitor network calls for API request
Expected Result: Balance automatically refreshes every 30 seconds and reflects the latest data from the server

Test Summary: Verify API response time is under 2 seconds
Data: API Endpoint: GET /api/accounts/12345/balance|Authorization: Bearer valid_token|Maximum Response Time: 2000ms

Action: Open browser developer tools network tab

Expected Result: API response is received in less than 2 seconds and balance is displayed promptly

Test Summary: Verify API requires valid Bearer token in Authorization header
Action: Send GET request to /api/accounts/{id}/balance without Authorization header
Data: API Endpoint: GET /api/accounts/12345/balance|No Token: null|Invalid Token: Bearer invalid_token_123|Expired Token: Bearer expired_token_456

Expected Result: API returns 401 Unauthorized status code for all requests without valid Bearer token

Test Summary: Verify balance display with large amount
Action: Login with credentials for high-balance account

Expected Result: Large balance is displayed with proper thousand separators and 2 decimal places as $1,234,567.89

Test Summary: Verify balance display with negative amount (overdraft)
Action: Login with credentials for overdraft account
Data: Username: overdraft@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Account Balance: -150.25|Expected Display: -$150.25 or ($150.25)

Action: Check for negative symbol or indicator

Expected Result: Negative balance is clearly displayed with negative indicator and maintains proper USD format with 2 decimal places

Test Summary: Verify user cannot access another user's balance
Data: User A: testuser@bank.com|User A Account ID: 12345|User B Account ID: 67890|Authorization: Bearer user_a_token

Action: Attempt to call API with User B's account ID
Check dashboard only shows own balance
Expected Result: API returns 403 Forbidden when attempting to access another user's balance data

Test Summary: Verify balance display handles API timeout gracefully
Data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Simulated Delay: 5000ms|Expected: Error message or retry mechanism

Action: Verify error handling and user feedback
Expected Result: Application displays appropriate error message or loading indicator when API timeout occurs and does not crash

Test Summary: Verify session expiry redirects to login
Data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Session Timeout: Simulated expiry|Expected Redirect: /login

Action: Wait for session to expire or invalidate session token

Expected Result: User is redirected to login page when session expires and balance is no longer accessible

Test Summary: Verify balance display with cents-only amount
Action: Login with credentials for low-balance account

Expected Result: Balance of less than one dollar displays correctly as $0.75 with proper formatting

Test Summary: Verify balance API handles invalid account ID
Data: Valid Token: Bearer valid_token|Non-existent ID: 99999999|Malformed ID: abc!@#|SQL Injection attempt: 1 OR 1=1

Action: Send GET request with non-existent account ID
Send GET request with malformed account ID

Expected Result: API returns 404 Not Found for non-existent accounts and 400 Bad Request for malformed IDs without exposing system information

Test Summary: Verify real-time balance reflects recent transactions
Data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Initial Balance: $1,000.00|Transaction: -$50.00 withdrawal|Expected New Balance: $950.00

Action: Perform a transaction in another session or via API

Expected Result: After 30-second refresh the balance accurately reflects the recent transaction showing updated amount
